name: SanDisk Ultra Dual Drive Go 2-in-1 Flash Drive Black
description: Move files from your phone to your computer easily with the Ultra Dual Drive Go from SanDisk. Sporting a design that incorporates both USB-C and USB-A connectors, you can easily store and transfer files between multiple devices.

features.Key Features: 32GB 64GB 128GB 256GB 516GB Capacity | USB-C and USB-A Connectors | USB 3.2 Gen 1 Interface | 400 MB/s Maximum Read Speed | Swivel Cover with Keyring Hole
features.What's In The Box: SanDisk 256GB Ultra Dual Drive Go 2-in-1 Flash Drive (Black)
